sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ هُنَاكَ قَطَّةٌ صَغِيرَةٌ وَحِيدَةٌ أَمَامَ الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bila je mala usamljena mačka ispred škole.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small lonely cat in front of the school.

sentences.arabic: رَآهَا الأَطْفَالُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ وَأَرَادُوا مُسَاعَدَتَهَا.
sentences.translation: Djeca su je viđala svaki dan i htjela su joj pomoći.
sentences.translationEn: The children saw her every day and wanted to help her.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعُوا طَعَامًا مِنْ بُيُوتِهِمْ وَأَحْضَرُوهُ لَهَا.
sentences.translation: Skupili su hranu iz svojih kuća i donijeli joj.
sentences.translationEn: They collected food from their homes and brought it to her.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَتِ الْقَطَّةُ وَمَشَتْ بِجَانِبِهِمْ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mačka je pojela i prošetala pored njih do škole.
sentences.translationEn: The cat ate and walked beside them to school.
